Business: The Ruby Mills Limited engages in the manufacture of textile products in India. The company operates in two segments, Textiles, and Real Estate and Related. It offers pure and blended fabrics, including cotton, polyester, viscose, modal, lyocell, linen, Bemberg, ramie, rayon, Lycra, and their blends under the Ruby, Lukas, Hitline, and Label R brand…
